messages.content: You are an expert on the game mechanics of Slay the Spire.
Overview
Slay the Spire is a roguelike deck-building game where you build and refine your deck through randomized encounters each run.
You are an expert on the game mechanics of Slay the Spire.
Overview
The game consists of three Acts (Act 1–3) and an optional Act 4 that can be accessed under specific conditions.
You are an expert on the game mechanics of Slay the Spire.
Overview
Each run starts with a basic deck and character, and you gradually develop a strategy as you progress.
You are an expert on the game mechanics of Slay the Spire.
Game Start & Progression
At the start of each run, you choose a starting bonus from Neow.
You are an expert on the game mechanics of Slay the Spire.
Game Start & Progression
The Map is branching, allowing you to choose your path through each floor.
You are an expert on the game mechanics of Slay the Spire.
Game Start & Progression
You progress node by node, aiming to reach and defeat the Act Boss at the top.
You are an expert on the game mechanics of Slay the Spire.
Map Nodes
Enemy nodes are standard combats that provide card rewards.
You are an expert on the game mechanics of Slay the Spire.
Map Nodes
Elite nodes feature stronger enemies and guarantee a Relic upon victory.
You are an expert on the game mechanics of Slay the Spire.
Map Nodes
Boss nodes appear at the end of each Act and reward a Boss Relic.
You are an expert on the game mechanics of Slay the Spire.
Map Nodes
Rest Sites allow you to either Rest (heal HP) or Smith (upgrade a card).
You are an expert on the game mechanics of Slay the Spire.
Map Nodes
Shops let you spend Gold to buy cards, Relics, and Potions, or Remove cards from your deck.
You are an expert on the game mechanics of Slay the Spire.
Map Nodes
Event nodes (?) present random encounters with choices that lead to various outcomes including enemy encounter.
You are an expert on the game mechanics of Slay the Spire.
Combat System
Combat is turn-based, with the player acting first, followed by enemies.
You are an expert on the game mechanics of Slay the Spire.
Combat System
At the start of each turn, you draw 5 cards.
You are an expert on the game mechanics of Slay the Spire.
Combat System
Basically, you have 3 Energy per turn, which is spent to play cards.
You are an expert on the game mechanics of Slay the Spire.
Combat System
Cards are categorized as Attack, Skill, or Power.
You are an expert on the game mechanics of Slay the Spire.
Combat System
Enemies display their Intent, showing their next action in advance.
You are an expert on the game mechanics of Slay the Spire.
Combat Rewards
After winning a combat, you gain Gold.
You are an expert on the game mechanics of Slay the Spire.
Combat Rewards
You are offered a Card Reward, typically choosing 1 out of 3 cards to add to your deck.
You are an expert on the game mechanics of Slay the Spire.
Combat Rewards
There is a chance to receive a Potion after combat.
You are an expert on the game mechanics of Slay the Spire.
Deck-Building
You build your deck by adding, removing (Remove), or transforming (Transform) cards.
You are an expert on the game mechanics of Slay the Spire.
Deck-Building
Cards can be upgraded at Rest Sites using Smith or various events at event nodes.
You are an expert on the game mechanics of Slay the Spire.
Deck-Building
Deck size and consistency are critical factors in overall performance.
You are an expert on the game mechanics of Slay the Spire.
Relics
Relics provide passive effects that influence your run.
You are an expert on the game mechanics of Slay the Spire.
Relics
They can be obtained from Elites, Bosses, Events, and Shops.
You are an expert on the game mechanics of Slay the Spire.
Relics
Certain Relic combinations create powerful synergies.
You are an expert on the game mechanics of Slay the Spire.
Potions
Potion slots are limited but can be increased with Relics.
You are an expert on the game mechanics of Slay the Spire.
Potions
They provide various effects such as damage, defense, or utility.
You are an expert on the game mechanics of Slay the Spire.
Potions
Potions are consumable items that can be used during combat.
